chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2136 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 16.08.2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- This petition seeks an order for rewriting / reconstructing the khata directly in favour of the petitioner in the record of rights without delay with respect to Survey No.301, 309, 421 admeasuring 1-17 ghunta, Deh Narli Tapa Bhitshah, Taluka Hala, District Matiari, without going into the procedure of scrutiny, because the respondent No.3 has already failed to do so. We are afraid that such intricate question that goes to the title of the property and entitlement of the petitioner cannot be adjudicated in proceedings under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973. Petitioner though called absent but the petition merits no consideration and is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
